widget.description: The detection SLA status of all incidents that their severity was determined. The widget takes into account incidents from the last 30 days by default, and inherits new time range when the dashboard time changes.

widget.name: Late SLA by Type
widget.query: -category:job and ( detectionsla.slaStatus:late or triagesla.slaStatus:late or containmentsla.slaStatus:late remediationsla.slaStatus:late )

widget.description: The mean time (average time) to detection across all incidents that their severity was determined. The widget takes into account incidents from the last 30 days by default.
widget.name: Mean Time to Detection

widget.description: A widget that shows the Mean Time to Detection, by incident type.
widget.name: MTTD by Type

widget.description: Shows changes in Mean Time to Resolution (in hours), over time, while differentiating between incident types.
widget.name: MTTR by Type

widget.description: Shows changes in Mean Time to Resolution (in minutes), over time, while differentiating between incident types.
widget.name: MTTR by Type (in minutes)
